title: Auth failure leaves stale typing and online users in relay_service.dart
description: When auth fails (errCode == -32001), _authFailed is set and the socket is closed, but _typingUsers, _typingTimers, and _onlineUsers are not cleared. If the user reconfigures their identity and reconnects, the UI shows stale typing indicators from the failed session. Fix: in the auth-failure branch, call _typingTimers.forEach((_, t) => t.cancel()), _typingTimers.clear(), _typingUsers.clear(), and _onlineUsers.clear().
close_reason: clear _typingTimers/_typingUsers/_onlineUsers in the -32001 auth failure branch
